userMessage: Set up UART on B1 CH1 115200 baud 8N1

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"group","label":"Configure B1 RS232 decode","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"2_1","type":"write","label":"Configure B1 RS232 decode (1/2)","params":{"command":"BUS:ADDNew \"RS232C\";BUS:B1:RS232C:SOUrce CH1;BUS:B1:RS232C:BITRate RATE115K"}},{"id":"2_2","type":"write","label":"Configure B1 RS232 decode (2/2)","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:RS232C:DATABits 8;BUS:B1:RS232C:PARity NONe;DISplay:WAVEView1:BUS:B1:STATE ON"}}]},{"id":"3","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
